nasb.text: Let darkness and black gloom claim it; Let a cloud settle on it; Let the blackness of the day terrify it.

esv.text: Let gloom and deep darkness claim it. Let clouds dwell upon it; let the blackness of the day terrify it.

cnv.text: 願黑暗與死蔭索討那日， 願密雲停留在上面， 願白天的昏黑驚嚇它。

ccb.text: 愿那日被黑暗和阴影笼罩， 被密云覆盖， 被阴暗淹没。
